case_title: SHAMEKA WILLIAMS-HURT VS. CITY AUTO TECH, INC.

docket_entries.description: CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED AND FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS-HURT, SHAMEKA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS-HURT, SHAMEKA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC. $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NONE GIVEN) SERVED JAN-05-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY WILLIAMS-HURT, SHAMEKA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AUTO TECH, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS-HURT, SHAMEKA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-29-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-20-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SENT A LETTER THROUGH HER HUSBAND MR. WILLIAMS--HURT, STATING SHE IS SICK. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS NOT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. D-506.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY LU DANG--MECHANIC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
